DESCRIPTION: Custom cogs for Red-DiscordBot, featuring RoleTools (with custom sticky roles blacklist functionality) and Welcome.
INSTALL_MSG: Add the repo using `[p]cog repo add abby-red-cogs https://github.com/abbyjank/red-cogs` and install cogs using `[p]cog install abby-red-cogs <cog_name>`.
NAME: abby-red-cogs
